styles.studio_cutout: full body head-to-toe, standing, isolated on a seamless pure white studio background, high-key evenly lit white backdrop, subject clearly separated from the background, soft three-point softbox lighting, sharp focus, shot on 50mm f8, photorealistic, natural skin texture, high detail
styles.portrait_light: upper body portrait, plain dark neutral studio background, photorealistic, natural skin texture, shot on 85mm f2, high detail
styles.scene_illus: cinematic semi-realistic digital illustration, stylized concept art, dramatic atmospheric lighting, rich saturated colors, painterly detail, artstation trending, beautiful, no text, no watermark
styles.char_illus: stylized semi-realistic 3D character render, Pixar Disney style, appealing clean design, soft cinematic lighting, subsurface scattering skin, friendly, full figure, no text, no watermark

_nota: Poses de Retrato (fotos reais, preferência do user) + retratos de qualidade da luz. O manequim vetorial (js/pages/photo-mannequin.js) é o fallback e serve o 'Onde cortar'.
